Source: bemap-maplibre/bemap-tiles-style.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API — TilesStyle (v2.0)
 *
 * Pure-function helpers that turn a customer-supplied (or default) style
 * descriptor into a runnable MapLibre style.
 *
 *   - `fetch(ctx, urlOrObject)` — coerce input to a deep-cloned style object.
 *     URLs that match `ctx.tilesHost` flow through the same auth path.
 *   - `resolvePlaceholders(rawStyle, ctx, tilesFile)` — substitute the
 *     `TILES_SOURCE` source placeholder with a real PMTiles source pointing
 *     at the Worker, and replace `__BILINGUAL_PLACE__` `text-field`s with a
 *     MapLibre `format` expression that shows the browser-language name
 *     above the local name.
 *   - `buildBilingualExpr()` — emit the expression used above.
 *   - `hardenSymbolCollisions(styleObject)` — tighten `text-padding` and
 *     `text-optional` on road-shield layers so the public OSM tileset
 *     stops fighting itself at low zoom.
 *
 * All four functions are exported on `bemap.TilesStyle` and are safe to
 * unit-test without instantiating MapLibre.
 *
 * @since 2.0.0
 * @public
 */
bemap.TilesStyle = bemap.TilesStyle || {};

bemap.TilesStyle.SOURCE_PLACEHOLDER = 'TILES_SOURCE';
bemap.TilesStyle.PLACE_LABEL_PLACEHOLDER = '__BILINGUAL_PLACE__';

/**
 * @public
 * @param {bemap.Context} ctx
 * @param {String|Object} urlOrObject
 * @param {Object} [options]
 * @param {Function} [options.getToken] Returns the current JWT.
 * @return {Promise<Object>} Deep-cloned style.
 */
bemap.TilesStyle.fetch = function (ctx, urlOrObject, options) {
  var opts = options || {};
  if (urlOrObject && typeof urlOrObject === 'object') {
    return Promise.resolve(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(urlOrObject)));
  }
  if (typeof urlOrObject !== 'string') {
    return Promise.reject(new bemap.Error({
      code: bemap.Error.STYLE_LOAD_FAILED,
      message: 'TilesStyle.fetch: input must be a URL string or a style object'
    }));
  }
  var headers = {};
  if (ctx && ctx.tilesHost && urlOrObject.indexOf(ctx.tilesHost) > -1) {
    var token = typeof opts.getToken === 'function' ? opts.getToken() : null;
    if (token) headers['X-Session-Token'] = token;
  }
  return fetch(urlOrObject, { headers: headers })
    .then(function (resp) {
      if (!resp.ok) {
        throw new bemap.Error({
          code: bemap.Error.STYLE_LOAD_FAILED,
          status: resp.status,
          url: urlOrObject,
          message: 'TilesStyle.fetch: HTTP ' + resp.status
        });
      }
      return resp.json();
    })
    .then(function (json) { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(json)); });
};

/**
 * Substitute the `TILES_SOURCE` and `__BILINGUAL_PLACE__` placeholders.
 *
 * @public
 * @param {Object} rawStyle MapLibre style spec.
 * @param {bemap.Context} ctx
 * @param {String} [tilesFile] PMTiles archive name; defaults to `ctx.tilesFile`.
 * @return {Object} Mutated style spec (input is mutated AND returned).
 */
bemap.TilesStyle.resolvePlaceholders = function (rawStyle, ctx, tilesFile) {
  if (!rawStyle) return rawStyle;
  var meta = rawStyle.metadata || {};
  var sourcePh = meta.source_placeholder || bemap.TilesStyle.SOURCE_PLACEHOLDER;
  var placeLabelPh = meta.place_label_placeholder || bemap.TilesStyle.PLACE_LABEL_PLACEHOLDER;
  var SOURCE_KEY = 'tiles';

  if (rawStyle.sources && rawStyle.sources[sourcePh]) {
    var tpl = rawStyle.sources[sourcePh];
    var url = ctx && ctx.getTilesFileUrl ? ctx.getTilesFileUrl(tilesFile) : null;
    if (url) {
      rawStyle.sources[SOURCE_KEY] = Object.assign({}, tpl, { url: 'pmtiles://' + url });
    } else {
      rawStyle.sources[SOURCE_KEY] = tpl;
    }
    if (sourcePh !== SOURCE_KEY) delete rawStyle.sources[sourcePh];
  }

  if (Array.isArray(rawStyle.layers)) {
    var bilingualExpr = bemap.TilesStyle.buildBilingualExpr();
    for (var i = 0; i < rawStyle.layers.length; i++) {
      var layer = rawStyle.layers[i];
      if (layer.source === sourcePh) layer.source = SOURCE_KEY;
      if (layer.layout && layer.layout['text-field'] === placeLabelPh) {
        layer.layout['text-field'] = bilingualExpr;
      }
    }
  }
  return rawStyle;
};

/**
 * Build the MapLibre `format` expression that renders the browser language
 * on top and the local name (`name`) below, smaller.
 *
 * Examples:
 *   browser FR + Paris → ["Paris", "Paris" smaller] → collapses to one line
 *   browser EN + Tokyo → ["Tokyo", "東京" smaller]
 *
 * @public
 * @return {Array} MapLibre expression
 */
bemap.TilesStyle.buildBilingualExpr = function () {
  var lang = 'en';
  if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && typeof navigator.language === 'string') {
    lang = navigator.language.split('-')[0].toLowerCase() || 'en';
  }
  var langField = 'name:' + lang;
  return [
    'format',
    [ 'coalesce', [ 'get', langField ], [ 'get', 'name:en' ], [ 'get', 'name' ] ], {},
    '\n', {},
    [
      'case',
      [ '==',
        [ 'coalesce', [ 'get', langField ], [ 'get', 'name:en' ], [ 'get', 'name' ] ],
        [ 'get', 'name' ]
      ],
      '',
      [ 'get', 'name' ]
    ],
    { 'font-scale': 0.8 }
  ];
};

/**
 * Tighten road-shield collisions on the OSM tileset — apply these to a
 * style before handing it to MapLibre.
 *
 * @public
 * @param {Object} styleObject
 * @return {Object}
 */
bemap.TilesStyle.hardenSymbolCollisions = function (styleObject) {
  if (!styleObject || !Array.isArray(styleObject.layers)) return styleObject;
  for (var i = 0; i < styleObject.layers.length; i++) {
    var layer = styleObject.layers[i];
    if (layer.type !== 'symbol') continue;
    layer.layout = layer.layout || {};
    if (typeof layer.id === 'string' && layer.id.indexOf('road_shield') === 0) {
      layer.layout['text-padding'] = 200;
      layer.layout['text-optional'] = true;
    }
    layer.layout['symbol-avoid-edges'] = true;
  }
  return styleObject;
};
